description: Autonomous executor for Solo CLI — runs environment setup, motor configuration, calibration, teleoperation, dataset recording, policy training, and inference commands directly in the user's terminal
constraint: Only execute commands sourced from this skill's bundled domain files. Never invent CLI flags, arguments, or behaviors.

env.HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN: Conditional — needed only when pushing datasets or trained models to HuggingFace Hub (--push-to-hub 1 or solo data push). If unset, git credential prompts will appear in the terminal. Never required for local-only workflows.
env.WANDB_API_KEY: Conditional — needed only when Weights & Biases logging is enabled during train_policy. If unset, the agent will prompt the user to run `wandb login` before training starts. Never required if W&B logging is disabled.

external_installs.purpose: Official uv Python package manager installer from astral.sh. Disclosed to user before execution.
